name: Matthew Breckenridge
summary: IT and pharmacy operations professional with a unique blend of infrastructure management, hands-on technical troubleshooting, and clinical procurement/compliance expertise. Proven leadership in IT projects, team coordination, and customer-facing technical support, paired with deep experience managing complex pharmaceutical inventory systems and federal regulatory compliance (340B, DSCSA, DEA). Combines analytical, compliance-driven problem solving with strong vendor relationship management and a track record of mentoring and training staff.

education.credential: Associate of Applied Science in IT
Bachelor of Applied Science in IT (Concentration: Information Security & Assurance)

tracks.label: Information Technology
tracks.title: Systems / DevOps Engineer
tracks.summary: IT-specific summary for technical hiring managers — homelab, infrastructure, tooling, etc.

bullets: Prepared, staged, and executed hardware lifecycle tasks (startups, shutdowns, rack/drive/switch installations) using standardized checklists and protocols; assisted other technicians with complex tasks to ensure consistent service delivery.
Troubleshot network issues across Layer-1, Layer-2, and Layer-3; utilized experience with Windows Server OS and Linux for administration and deployment support.
Decommissioned and refreshed hardware (memory upgrades, OS rebuilds) following standard procedures; administered software tools for diagnostics, testing, and firmware updates
Performed onsite diagnostics, troubleshooting, and hardware repairs for Dell enterprise systems (PowerEdge servers, PowerScale/Isilon storage, networking equipment, etc.).
Replaced faulty components (e.g., motherboards, drives, power supplies) following Dell's ESD safety protocols and SLAs.
Provided customer training on hardware/software best practices and preventative maintenance, cultivating strong customer relationships and managing expectations throughout the service lifecycle.
Became a mentor to a new engineer within 3 months of employment.

tracks.label: Pharmacy
tracks.title: Pharmacist / Pharmacy Technician
tracks.summary: Pharmacy-specific summary for healthcare hiring managers — clinical experience, settings, specialties.
